data.body: AC amendment: Extracted event handlers must be placed as separate modules inside plugins/dso/scripts/bridge/ (created by prerequisite task 3024-104c). Each of the 7 handlers becomes its own .py file inside bridge/. Add re-export statements to plugins/dso/scripts/bridge/__init__.py. Original bridge-outbound.py becomes a thin dispatcher. Verify: test -f $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/bridge/__init__.py && ls $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/bridge/*.py | grep -v __init__
